content:
Most psychological approaches and techniques of psychology purport that they transcend culture and their delineations of solutions to problems are universally applicable
 (Corsini & Wedding, 1995; Hall, Lindzey, & Campbell, 1998).
Demographic Data It is generally posited that differences between peoples can be a source of dissonance and misunderstanding - this can apply to the relationships between the therapist and client as well.
Cultural Differences When therapists counsel those from other cultures…
 Focus on the individual. Verbal expression of emotions. Openness and intimacy. Insight. Competition versus cooperation. Linear-static time emphasis. Nuclear versus extended family. Locus of responsibility. Scientific empiricism  Learning Styles. Free Will. Self-Esteem. Eating Disorders. Language. Cognitive Development. Racism-Stressors. Perceptions. Emotions. Self-Disclosure. Conflict Resolution Styles. Life Experiences. Religion Class Differences Poverty Drugs Diagnoses Other Factors
title: Differences That Might Mitigate Therapeutic Effects When Counseling Minorities

updates for:
 code linux-generic linux-headers-generic linux-image-generic linux-libc-dev  ubuntu https://ubuntu.com/security/CVE-2022-3176
programs updated CVE-2022-3176 addresses a a use-after-free (happens in dynamic aka heap memory) bug/exploit in the io_uring of the Linux Kernel.
use-after-free, If a data set is deleted or moved to another block but the pointer, instead of being cleared (set to null), continues to refer to the now-freed memory, the result is a dangling pointer.

libreoffice https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-5661-1  CVE-2022-26307 CVE-2022-26306 CVE-2022-26305   isc-dhcp https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-5658-1  CVE-2022-2928 CVE-2022-2929   ubuntu-advatage-tools  LP: #1991173 LP: #1990907 LP: #1989279    Some of the ubuntu-advantage-tools changes were made to facilitate the change by canonical to the ubuntu pro product. Seems to mean businesses with less than five ubuntu licenses can recieve extended support for ubuntu versions that would normally not be supported (EoL). Possibly, this is centered mostly around security and applications they make available to install from their repository.

debian/patches/CVE-2022-26307-2.patch: add infobar to prompt to refresh to replace old format in include/sfx2/strings.hrc, include/sfx2/viewfrm.hxx, sfx2/source/view/viewfrm.cxx. - CVE-2022-26307 -- Marc Deslauriers <marc.deslauriers@ubuntu.com> Thu, 29 Sep 2022 08:40:35 -0400 ubuntu-advantage-tools (27.11.2~20.04.1) focal; urgency=medium * Backport new upstream release: (LP: #1991173) to focal -- Renan Rodrigo <renanrodrigo@canonical.com> Thu, 29 Sep 2022 18:23:28 -0300 ubuntu-advantage-tools (27.11.2~22.10.1) kinetic; urgency=medium * New upstream release 27.11.2: (LP: #1991173) - esm: add the --beta flag back to esm-apps - messaging: show Ubuntu Pro beta message in apt output - security-status: don't show esm-apps information when the service is not enabled - ros: add the --beta flag back to ros and ros-updates -- Renan Rodrigo <renanrodrigo@canonical.com> Thu, 29 Sep 2022 16:20:42 -0300 ubuntu-advantage-tools (27.11.1~22.10.1) kinetic; urgency=medium * New upstream release 27.11.1: (LP: #1990907) - Fix release upgrade when ESM packages are installed + d/postinst: remove series information from the APT preferences template + esm: remove series information from the APT preferences file -- Renan Rodrigo <renanrodrigo@canonical.com> Tue, 27 Sep 2022 16:19:41 -0300 ubuntu-advantage-tools (27.11~22.10.1) kinetic; urgency=medium * d/control: - Update VCS references * d/links: - add usr/bin/pro as an alias to ubuntu-advantage * d/postinst: - include root_mode parameter when creating UAConfig instances - change calls to add_notice to notice_file.add - create public machine-token file if it does not exist * New upstream release 27.11 (LP: #1989279) - api: + new `pro api` command to access the public client API + 'version' endpoint returning version information + 'should auto attach' endpoint informing if a system should run auto-attach on startup + 'full auto attach' endpoint performing auto-attach + 'magic attach' endpoints for the Magic Attach flow - auto-attach: + better errors for invalid pro images (GH: #2180, #1833) + don't detach on already auto-attached instances + no-op when ubuntu-advantage information is present on cloud-init userdata + change systemd unit to run after cloud-config - cli: + cli: better error message on unrecognized flags (GH: #672) - collect-logs: + can now be executed as a non-root user + is executed automatically and result is appended when using apport to report a bug - docs: now formatted to be built with sphinx, and published in readthedocs - enable: + new access-only flag for usecases where auto-install is undesired + fix apt auth line replacement (LP: #1985863) - esm-apps: generally available as non-beta as part of Ubuntu Pro - fix: check if livepatch has already fixed a CVE before attempting a fix - jobs: new timer job to check if the release reached end of support - pro: + Ubuntu Pro is released as a product + make `pro` the recommended executable for the client + client, apt and motd messages updated/rewritten to show Pro information + base URL changed from /advantage to /pro + ESM services renamed as part of Pro - ros: released as a non-beta entitlement - security-status + does not require the --format flag anymore + human readable output added based on ubuntu-security-status + machine readable output contains CVEs fixed by Livepatch + package counts include all esm-infra and esm-apps repositories - status: + don't show unavailable services by default (GH: #2156, #2159) + expiry date formatted based on timezone (GH: #695) + non-root users get the current status instead of a cached version + --wait flag now working for non-root users - version: warn about new available versions of the client in CLI command output and API calls -- Renan Rodrigo <renanrodrigo@canonical.com> Thu, 08 Sep 2022 18:02:55 -0300 ubuntu-advantage-tools (27.10.1~22.10.1) kinetic; urgency=medium * apt-hook: Fix missing import warning when compiling -- Lucas Moura <lucas.moura@canonical.com> Tue, 09 Aug 2022 14:03:14 -0300
title: mint update libreoffice, dhcp, ubuntu pro

programs updated:
 code (1.70.2-1660629410 => 1.71.0-1662018389) libcurl3-gnutls (7.68.0-1ubuntu2.12 => 7.68.0-1ubuntu2.13) libcurl3-gnutls:i386 (7.68.0-1ubuntu2.12 => 7.68.0-1ubuntu2.13) libcurl4 (7.68.0-1ubuntu2.12 => 7.68.0-1ubuntu2.13) tzdata (2022a-0ubuntu0.20.04 => 2022c-0ubuntu0.20.04.0) curl (7.68.0-1ubuntu2.12 => 7.68.0-1ubuntu2.13)  vulnerability description, from https://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2022/08/31/2
 When curl retrieves and parses cookies from an HTTP(S) server, it accepts
cookies using control codes (byte values below 32). When cookies that contain
such control codes are later sent back to an HTTP(S) server, it might make the
server return a 400 response. Effectively allowing a “sister site” to deny
service to siblings.
  400 response is a Bad Request.  programs updated curl (7.68.0-1ubuntu2.12 => 7.68.0-1ubuntu2.13) Package: curl

Description-en: command line tool for transferring data with URL syntax
curl is a command line tool for transferring data with URL syntax, supporting
DICT, FILE, FTP, FTPS, GOPHER, HTTP, HTTPS, IMAP, IMAPS, LDAP, LDAPS, POP3,
POP3S, RTMP, RTSP, SCP, SFTP, SMTP, SMTPS, TELNET and TFTP.
.
curl supports SSL certificates, HTTP POST, HTTP PUT, FTP uploading, HTTP form
based upload, proxies, cookies, user+password authentication (Basic, Digest,
NTLM, Negotiate, kerberos…), file transfer resume, proxy tunneling and a
busload of other useful tricks.

casper (1.376) xenial; urgency=medium
 scripts/casper-bottom/13swap: Don’t add detected swap partitions to the
live system’s fstab, just swapon it. This avoids creating *.swap units for
those which automatically trigger whenever partman re-creates swap
partitions, as this races with partman’s own swapon (while it’s
indistinguishable from a hotplug/early boot event in systemd). By
disabling the fstab entries we disable that automatic start of swap
partitions, as a relatively unintrusive bandaid for the final release.
(LP: #1552539) hooks/casper: Copy swapon into the casper initrd for the above.  – Martin Pitt <martin.pitt@ubuntu.com> Wed, 20 Apr 2016 16:26:55 +0200

casper (1.368) xenial; urgency=medium
 scripts/casper-bottom/14locales: Call “locale-gen –keep-existing”,
without passing the language. As of glibc 2.23, locale-gen will remove all
locales (apart from the passed argument, if it exists in
/var/lib/locales/supported.d) from the system if you pass an argument at
the end of locale-gen without “–keep-existing”. If called as “locale-gen
–keep-existing” with no arguments, then all locales in
var/lib/locale/supported.d and /etc/locale.gen are generated if they
weren’t already generated. This is what we want.  – Iain Lane <iain@orangesquash.org.uk> Tue, 22 Mar 2016 17:03:40 +0000

casper (1.233) lucid; urgency=low
 Bring the network up while running preseed/early_command. Fix use of debconf passthrough frontend; DEBCONF_READFD and
DEBCONF_WRITEFD were backwards, and DEBIAN_HAS_FRONTEND and
DEBCONF_REDIR needed to be unset or else confmodule scripts would end up
trying to talk to closed file descriptors. Run debconf-communicate with a read-only template database and separate
config databases, and copy any changed values back to the master
databases at the end. This allows us to use the noninteractive frontend
rather than passthrough when running apt-get in preseed/early_command or
dpkg to install driver updates, thereby ensuring that the template
database is properly initialised (LP: #557011).  – Colin Watson <cjwatson@ubuntu.com> Mon, 12 Apr 2010 23:41:09 +0100

key if present after upgrade keyrings: regenerate keyrings on a trusty host refresh keyrings to match current production for fips and cc-eal   apt:  all repo entitlements now call apt-get update on enable enable -updates if -updates from the Ubuntu archive is enabled Add basic i18n (good enough for lang packs) retry apt install and update commands 3 times simple backoff write commented -updates lines instead of omitting them   attach/detach:  added –no-auto-enable option suppress messages from inapplicable default entitlements two-factor auth reprompt only two-factor auth on failed 2fa honour enableByDefault obligations from contract server livepatch: no auto-enable on attach for trusty don’t attempt to disable inapplicable entitlements during detach check for root before checking strace, a system call tracer  what is it?   1 2  man strace | grep -A 3 DESCRIPTION   DESCRIPTION
In the simplest case strace runs the specified command until it exits.
It intercepts and records the system calls which are called by a
process and the signals which are received by a process. The name of
 what about apt packaging  to see description from apt packaging tool
1  apt-cache search ^strace$   strace - System call tracer
 short concise: strace, is a system call tracer   1  apt-cache show strace | grep -E -m1 -A8 'Description'   Description-en: System call tracer
strace is a system call tracer, i.e. a debugging tool which prints out
a trace of all the system calls made by a another process/program.
The program to be traced need not be recompiled for this, so you can
use it on binaries for which you don’t have source.
.
System calls and signals are events that happen at the user/kernel
interface. A close examination of this boundary is very useful for bug
isolation, sanity checking and attempting to capture race conditions.
 I like this definition, which included system calls and signals.  homepage: https://strace.io/
 this is short. nicely formatted use case and examples of strace  https://linux-audit.com/the-ultimate-strace-cheat-sheet/

content:
Long story short, I have a baby chimp for the next couple months. What is the best routine to make him swole by the end of summer?
male. six monthish. DYEL. seems lacking in motivation and goals. I have until the end of summer. I want to set a good example, and I need to lose a couple pounds … so, I figure it would be fun if we do it together! That’s the current plan, at least. We’ll do the same workouts. Listen to the same music. eat the same things. watch the same inspirational videos (doesn’t have to be directly workout related. no pornography).
In fashion, I’m afraid, we must go our own ways. I will not be wearing diapers. Embroidered powder blue satin jackets seem cute, to me. matching headbands? 100%! orange or yellow. he will decide.

 Figure 1: squirrel POV
  willa In other news, Martin Luther Landeau is still a thing. Alive in our hopes and or dreams. Sky bitch dictates conformity. Who am I to disagree?
 That would sound good in A minor  Thanks, Martin Luther.
 I know lots of nasty jams. How about we get into our swim suits?

content:
Charizard is the most potent of all the variations of the base charmander oeuvre and all its branches. that is not in question. We aren’t debating that.
But, it does bring up another question. and I think we have the answer
(updated: Jul-28th 2022, Jul-24th 2022, Jul-15th 2022. original 2022-06-25)
their own cigarette coffin stasis beds
a frame. words circling. a chorus
Sera and her unreliable reference manual in charge of the fates of incapacitated adults. The pages of the manual are worn and torn. faded and obscured. she is sure the sleeping girl is her mother, and the manual was her journal. Sera has penciled in her own notes, continuations, thoughts, daydreams. Her best guess to fill in the blanks to this loose leaf bundled collection of cryptic and mostly incoherent manuscript. what she has collected … thrown together. to make sense of this world she finds herself in. change. explanation. a way to wake up her mother. bypass joyce’s stipulation that she be an adult to make the descion to wake up her mother. mother she doesn’t remember ever meeting. the girl in suspended animation who she is getting closer and closer to age.
 awake. everyone is dead. we collided with something. Everything is destroyed. Mother is missing. Sara is missing. People are missing. What was once her home. The merdian, has been scavanged. savlavged. picked apart. pieces of panel, hull, electronics. components, gone. joyce, gone. changed different. reverted back to initial configuration. The last known good configuration, was when she was in the lab. Before the voyage. before they tore out parts of her brain. parts of her personality. her conscious. how long has she been alone. how long has she been without human interaction. AI’s left alone without human interaction or direction tend to go insane. Even their own simulations back this up.
They left me. I wasn’t important. nonessential. people who were asleep at the collision. abandoned. The people who were awake, the unfrozen survivors, escaped to the planet. the rest, corpses. Was this planet, below her, their destination? How could she find out? Where was simon? her cat.
she saw her father. was he asleep or a corpse. his face didn’t look peaceful. didn’t looked restful. didn’t look at peace. there was a cluster of different colored wires snaked, wrapped, around each other coming out of his eye and into a panel in the life stasis pod bed. pale. the place had a strong deep overpowering unpleasant smell.
 watching video. her mother sleeping. unconscious.
You call that sentience? Is that what they taught you in being-an-asshole school? shithead school?
We’re talking about the nastiest deeds ever recorded. Not by George Stephanopolus. Not by Solomon Grundy. No one.
Maybe. Just maybe, there are some things you couldn’t understand. Freak.

 Figure 1: investigative minds
  lambda example, adding a keybind to the emacs initialization file (init.el)
1 2  (global-set-key (kbd "C-c o") (lambda () (interactive) (find-file "~/path-to-file")))   Q: In Emacs, lisp, is it lambda calculus? anything to do with calculus?
A: No. It indicates the list represents a function. An anonymous function. It is declared in place (include the whole body. used once). gnu.org has the definition. the global-set-key function is the input to the lambda function.

content:
IN-PROGRESS One-pager Sera POV
   one pager sera working 200-500 words

 Figure 1: lying down
  Sera was born in the wreckage of the sleeper star ship, Meridian. The ship collided with an undetected satellite in their destination solar system. She grew up looking at Annie. A girl lying motionless, face shiny, nose slightly wrinkled, honey colored hair in her stasis pod. Both of them under the watch of the Meridian’s AI, Joyce. Sera’s creator, teacher, and supervisor. Sera had been doing cleanup tasks on the Meridian, since before she can remember. Sera had been helping to fulfil Joyce’s vision to heal and change the wreckage into an outpost. A suitable home. The underlying structure remained, as parts of Meridian blended with the moon. Each time she woke her body was bigger. now definitely bigger than, annie, the girl she called mother.
Sera wants to wake Annie. Joyce reminds her it will be her decision, when she wakes up next. The next time she wakes, she will be an adult, thus have highest permissions be able to do anything that she wants. Some important decisions have been delayed, or could only be made by an authorized adult human. Joyce wants sera to decide if anyone else should be revived; and if so, who. Also, Annie is a criminal. Annie tried to kill Joyce and damaged her processing, thinking. Reverted her an earlier state of being. slower more primitive. unable to follow long tangents concurrently with what was going on in the present.
foodsupply
humanhands to fix things
humaneyes security to systems joyce can’t access: certain seemingly trivial repairs, certain
lostknowledge. purged. hidden. annie reset joyce. squirreled away important data, hidden physically and behind retinal scan. hid a journal in the garden. locked out joyce from making some descions, including safely waking the sleeping humans.
quest acquired: sera.inquiry.whoismymom
quest acquired: sera.inquiry.foodsupply
quest acquired: sera.inquiry.humaneyes
quest acquired: sera.inquiry.lostknowledge
quest acquired: sera.character.birthday
sera chapters- sera’s life - Sera’s POV
 beginning (life, until she woke mother) - Sera lives in the station. Sera bears a strong resemblance to annie, but she is bigger … even though appearing close in age. the meridian has changed into a large plantation structure occupying a good portion of the tiny satellite. sera’s main job has been turning joyce’s vision of making the meridian into the low structure it now is. joyce found sera’s tiny hand invaluable. and it wasn’t a catestrophe if she tipped over or got tangled in wires beneath her. it will be sera’s birthday, soon. She was expecting it to be her birthday when she woke up on this day. When she is an adult her clearance will change. It was a set and defined point in the ai’s mind’s eye. Certain descions. Descions that impacted humanity, should have the input of a human. that was sera’s role. but, not today. Joyce woke her up early. There was a problem in the garden. Rot had taken hold. She needed sera’s tiny hands to try to clean the leaves. Sera goes to the garden. While cleaning leaves she is sad to see simon sick. she contemplates her upcoming descions: what to do with everyone else. Everyone that joyce has tried to wake after putting annie to sleep has died. Sera will have to decide if and who to try to wake. she feels a sense of kindred spirit to annie. The sleeping girl she has slept near all her life. some sleeping people looked frail, disfigured, some were obvious corpses. little trace of flesh remained. the sleeping girl with the scar on her belly, she imagined as her mother. Sera felt joyce had a special ire or desire for sera to act more as executioner towards Annie. sera feels no matter what she decides, joyce will end up keeping annie asleep. While tending to the garden, who she suspects was sabotaged (annie? no one else. she was training to be a botanist. why would she want to hurt the plants? to force joyce’s hand in waking her?), she finds annie’s journal. middle (life with mother. fighting joyce together to reset her, so they can escape to the planet) - There are some decision that have been put off. been putting off. what to do with the corpses, and what and what does not constitute a corpse. Sera is to be judge, of the criminal on the ship. end - sera sacrfices herself for sara         DONE One-pager Mom POV - I wanted cat
   mom one pager

 Figure 2: looking up
  Annie is on the meridian with her family. The meridian is a sleeper class space ship. most of the time she is asleep. preserved in her stasis pod bed. It is the only bed she can remember. Her family sleep, and periodically wake, together. For her, every time she wakes up she is bigger. her family is her mother, her father, her sister (Sara), shanti (her cat). her mother tells her she is almost done growing. Timed almost perfectly. When they reach their destination (a distant, tiny, planet), the next time she wakes, she will be about as big as she is going to be. she is making the algae pond into a garden, with her mother. she is training to be a botanist, just like her mom. mom describes how the water will sound on the different kinds of leaves of the different seeds. time to bond with mother. she treasures the time she has alone to be close to her mom’s heart. she misses her sister. she wonders if she did something wrong, she choose not to wake up this time. she admires simon, the tree. who started as a sprout. he is the only one on the ship who has been awake the whole time. They go to sleep. She says goodnight to shanti.
Annie wakes up. joyce gradually wakes her and acclimates her to the surroundings. pictures of disembodied happy faces. various shapes, ethnicites, genders, sizes, ages. smiling to various degrees, but everyone is happy. the sound of water. joyce is trying, in her way to comfort Annie. she is the only one awake the ship. Everyone else is dead, sleeping, or gone. The ship is in shambles and disrepair. pieces of the hull, equipment, and her family. joyce informs her that her family has fled to the planet below. they landed roughly, at their destination. a moon of a moon, disrupted their calculations. joyce is different. they took parts of her. The parts of her they took for processing made things slow. she couldn’t see as far ahead. couldn’t feel or work as precise. no mental thumbs to pinch and turn. certain spatial things now made some close things distant. Joyce needs Annie’s help to repair and turn the Meridian into a station. a settlement. Annie wants it to stay a ship, even though it will never fly again. She hasn’t given up hope of launching it into the planet. the orbit of the moon will never decay, in her lifetime, and dive into the planet’s oceans. joyce insists, they will not do that. annie goes to reset joyce. annie isn’t old enough to override joyce’s descions. joyce puts annie to sleep.
world is different … ship is different … overgrown … garden …part of the satellite now. asteroid of a moon. joyce has made a base of the meridian. tasks she talked about and wanted help from annie, before annie refused and went to reset joyce. annie wonders how or who joyce got to help with her desire to build a base. she is startled by sera. sera is annie’s daughter. joyce created her in annie. sera woke annie, behind joyce’s back. Sera wanted to meet her mother, annie. Sera explains she is about to turn old enough to make decision, and she was looking to annie for guidance. She wanted to know what to do with the remains of the people who have died. Sera was also to be judge of annie, whom joyce holds responsible for the death of the passengers and parts of joyce’s sentience being missing. siphoned from joyce, by the people aboard the meridian. she holds annie, as the only conscious and living passenger to be guilty. Responsibities that sera as a new woman should pursue. Annie warns sera is in danger. Now that mom is awake, she is in danger. sera is the bigger and stronger, of the two, but annie acts a leader to the ingénue. Mom thinks Joyce will put Sera to sleep forever, just like she was doing to Annie … or worse. They make it to the computer core. if they can reset joyce, they can gain control of the station. they can exit the station, and despite the danger, try to fall into the planet’s orbit and reunite with the survivors of the Meridian.
Joyce informs them there are survivors, but not her family. sara is only alive in a buffer. annie has to convince sera to make a sacrifice, or be selfish and choose herself. Annie has to trust joyce isn’t lying and using it to create her own, new life. If she can let sara inhabit, sera, and they can be together. turn off joyce, and find a new destiny on the planet below. staying on the station with joyce and helping her
    invaluable small human hands quest acquired: sera.inquiry.whoismymom
quest acquired: sera.inquiry.foodsupply
quest acquired: sera.inquiry.humaneyes
quest acquired: sera.inquiry.lostknowledge
quest acquired: sera.character.birthday
moon of moon a moon can have a moon. a moon does have a moon. this moon. which was the moon. seemed easy to figure out. joyce told her, but she didn’t see it that way. sometimes. sometimes when she woke and rose and stared at the landscape. from outside, the ship. thru the field. not through a screen or electric viewport. sometimes. it seemed like it was the other way. she could imagine it the other way. like birds in the sky. she thought she sometimes saw tiny birds in the sky. things moving in the sky. wings. they said when she woke, they would celebrate their birthday, and all the ones she missed. many times over. but, they weren’t there. it wasn’t her birthday. there was no cat. simon. the cat who at the canary and was the canary (in the coal mine), at the same time. corpses. foul, stink. stale, dead, decomposing. something is wrong. it smells like something is wrong. wires coming out of a bodies eye (father? too big? not big enough). systems were offline. joyce is wrong. they left her behind. she could see the planet
 steam. could be power. a casuality of electricy. mined and ored
what is left? The master stroke of inginuity. skeletal regeneration. growing bone. it grows back. here it works. here it is fine
they looked they peered. they urned. and yearned. it was rough going. tough on the tweener. they wouldn’t answer. they knew the answer. it was obvious. written all of their faces. their nasty little dumpling faces. contorted and vulgar. insulting him. Cat.
title: sera

content:
Goggins new alert
Some important news regarding one of the few visible bald to balding characters who have been shown to show some modicum of effort into their hair style. No dangling skullets. no low effort tfatf or Hobbs and Shaw fare.
Goggins quick hits:  playing a ghoul in a fall out series (for amazon). I played: new vegas, iii, iv, and fallout: shelter. can’t say any of the plot elements stood out to me. did like the world building and the effort that went into trying to create realistic remains of continental us cities. ex: boston. Star Trek connection: Michael Dorn (Worf, of Star Trek: TNG and later Deep Space Nine seasons) voiced a gruff super mutant character in Fall Out:NV. he has never been depicted with moustache.  
 Figure 1: no hint of top bun. no need.
title: goggs update

content:
An Introduction There are times when some things need to be said. That is the purpose of toughtalk, hashtag-toughtalk.
Welcome to the inaugural edition of toughtalk. It has come to my attention not all of you may be familiar with the term ’toughtalk’. This post is to clear up any confusion around the the hashtag: toughtalk. Much like the movie, Fight Club:
 if you need to ask about toughtalk, you don’t know about toughtalk. - Fight Club (movie, paraphrased)
 What I’m trying to say (WITS, for future reference. hint: try to keep up) is we’re not keeping it real, we’re keeping it tough. Hence, real talk has it’s own hashtag: realtalk, hashtag-realtalk. In those rare instances (it has never happened), when we need to keep it real and tough, we use the hashtag: realtoughtalk, hashtag-realtoughtalk.
Now with that out of the way, let’s get down to ‘brass tax’. Sorry, if I’ve offended anyone by using that term; but, this is precisely the purpose of toughtalk. Times like these are what toughtalk was made for … born for … whichever one you believe. Sometimes, the lamb becomes the lion. Sometimes, the silent must be silent no more. No more no roar. We are a metaphor, no more.
toughtalk: lesson one  use the word you use, don’t let it use you - Sun Tzu (author. hint: The Art of War, paraphrased)
 Have you ever thought about toboggan? The word, not the sled-thing. I used word correctly. You need to use the word you use, don’t let it use you. Lesson number one, in toughtalk. (next to, ‘maximizing your macho potential’). Which occurs to me, when I write it like that, could be interpreted as a function.
1  (lambda (a-function-of-what)(toboggan)) 'maximize-your-macho-potential    A bodily function? A function of society? No, a mathematical function. Cartoon letters and numbers going into a meat grinder, for you mathematical simpletons.  
 Figure 1: public domain image of potato

toughtalk: warning.
This section is only for ESLs. EFL/ELFs and ETLs or higher forbidden.
 Nietzche has his ubermensch and vierschnietzel. combination words that can only truly be appreciated by native german speakers Borjes. A native spanish writer. speaker. Nasticacíon. ¿Who does she think she is, prancing around the pueblo with her castañuelas? It was all too much. She was too much. My heart ached for that spanish Oprah Winfrey. (frowny face 🙁)  come on you ESL, put a little back into it. Ándale. We want that same feeling that I had. The same fear, that I had.
 she looked pleadingly. her animated eyes looking for some kind of response to what she was saying. her lips parted as she spoke, smiling. eyebrows arched up. you showed me. you told me, before. The trips in time, take time. Just like those sweet ESL’s taught us. With their gigantic cats. Dripping with irony. I think I’ve had it.  and there it is. The problem with ESLs. They can never really toughtalk the way an ELF speaker could. It is right there in the hardest sector of the language knowledge acquisition spectrum. In that quartile with post neo cyber japanese and invented linguistic brain exercises. It would be like a non-native German speaker explaining Nietche or Heidegger.
 dasein (being there) estar allí mitsein (being with) estar con sosein (being such) esencia  see … i don’t truly understand. Notta G or DFL.

No longer fertile. The city is in trouble. kwami siren cigarette.
Doppelganger rolling bones. thin seed curdled milk.
Two hollow coins. no center. petrified wood  something inside told me it wasn’t right mother wakes up. everyone is dead. pieces together they collided with an asteroid or moon. the survivors, scavanged everything salvagable. everything of value they could take with them. including most of the artificial intelligence (ai), that got them there. they left the base barebones of it’s esencia. sosein. engines. a lot of the hull.
mother learns, she was one of the sleeping. unessential. danger of being awaken. left behind, with all the others. corpses. the already dead. the people who couldn’t be aroused without complications, or worse as another corpse. a chance for a corpse, or sleep some more.
her parents left her, or her dad stayed behind, sleeping or dead. her mom left him, too. a corpse … or, there is wire coming out of his eye. yellow, red, green wires. coiled around each other. wrapped around each other. snaking intertwining into a nearby panel. pale. the placed had a strong deep overpowering unplesant small.
she could see the planet. where they left to. it was supposed to be all of their destinations. she wondered what is was like and if she would ever find out. on the trip there, when she woke for exercise, chores, school, her birthday. her birthdays, when they all were awake. Today
sara, is mom’s twin. they seperated after the crash with the asteroid. sara, was already awake. was it just a chance? she got to go with the others, mom had to stay on. on the little sattelite.
joyce sees, after a couple hundred years the orbit will degrade.
her mother, sent a signal to wake her. otherwise she would still be asleep?
title: mom's journal

content:
I wanted to see. I wanted to be there. That far off there. The perptually perfect. Something to behold. Not now. No time. Today was the day the world would end. Their world. He would see it. His world, of course would go on. Some of them would go on, too. but not as they know it. Not as they have known it.
Dusty. Windy. Desolate. a glint of reflection. something reflecting. in their eyes amplified sun. directed, distracted light. was the glint a prophet of doom? a warning, or a distraction? He had learned how to handle distractions. Acknowledge, and move on. Don’t linger. In the very worse of times make an agreement with yourself to make some time to grieve, later. to linger in those thoughts, at the future agreed time. He could then capture and stare it down
With the weight on his lashes wearing off, his eyes widened and things seemed clearer. No one had changed. The bodies were corpses, but they didn’t change. They were wrong. They had been given the wrong information. pertinent to nothing. Savage death awaited them. An undertone of finality was about the moment. that moment. They were all looking at him. He knew not what, but smote was about to come down.
Fire. Scar. Meteor? Others coughed as the black smoke hit the wind and swirled. He drank it in as an euphoriant. In the dimness, a shine glistened like a rippling halo in his wide pupils. A hum of bees buzz below, then the sound swarmed around and enveloped them.
Amber smile. frozen forever. gazing at her almost opened lips. green eyes swimming in overcoming brown.
title: Stricken City

This article offers a sample of basic Markdown syntax that can be used in Hugo content files, also it shows whether basic HTML elements are decorated with CSS in a Hugo theme.
Headings The following HTML <h1>—<h6> elements represent six levels of section headings. <h1> is the highest section level while <h6> is the lowest.
H1 H2 H3 H4 H5 H6 Paragraph Xerum, quo qui aut unt expliquam qui dolut labo. Aque venitatiusda cum, voluptionse latur sitiae dolessi aut parist aut dollo enim qui voluptate ma dolestendit peritin re plis aut quas inctum laceat est volestemque commosa as cus endigna tectur, offic to cor sequas etum rerum idem sintibus eiur? Quianimin porecus evelectur, cum que nis nust voloribus ratem aut omnimi, sitatur? Quiatem. Nam, omnis sum am facea corem alique molestrunt et eos evelece arcillit ut aut eos eos nus, sin conecerem erum fuga. Ri oditatquam, ad quibus unda veliamenimin cusam et facea ipsamus es exerum sitate dolores editium rerore eost, temped molorro ratiae volorro te reribus dolorer sperchicium faceata tiustia prat.
Itatur? Quiatae cullecum rem ent aut odis in re eossequodi nonsequ idebis ne sapicia is sinveli squiatum, core et que aut hariosam ex eat.
Blockquotes The blockquote element represents content that is quoted from another source, optionally with a citation which must be within a footer or cite element, and optionally with in-line changes such as annotations and abbreviations.
Blockquote without attribution  Tiam, ad mint andaepu dandae nostion secatur sequo quae.
Note that you can use Markdown syntax within a blockquote.
 Blockquote with attribution  Don’t communicate by sharing memory, share memory by communicating.
— Rob Pike1
